mapper.select: SELECT d.*, c.name AS category_name FROM dramas d LEFT JOIN categories c ON d.category_id = c.id WHERE d.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dramas WHERE public_id = #{publicId}

SELECT d.*, c.name AS category_name FROM dramas d LEFT JOIN categories c ON d.category_id = c.id
ORDER BY d.sort ASC, d.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN d.status = 'published' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS published_count, SUM(CASE WHEN d.status = 'draft' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS draft_count, SUM(CASE WHEN d.status = 'offline' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS offline_count, COALESCE(SUM(d.view_count), 0) AS total_views, COALESCE(SUM(d.total_episodes), 0) AS total_episodes_sum FROM dramas d
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dramas ( public_id, title, cover, description, category_id, status, view_count, sort, display_name, display_text, total_episodes, free_episodes, beans_per_episode, oss_path, category, task_status, is_online ) VALUES ( #{publicId}, #{title}, #{cover}, #{description}, #{categoryId}, #{status}, #{viewCount}, #{sort}, #{displayName}, #{displayText}, #{totalEpisodes}, #{freeEpisodes}, #{beansPerEpisode}, #{ossPath}, #{category}, #{taskStatus}, #{isOnline} )
mapper.update: UPDATE dramas SET public_id = #{publicId}, title = #{title}, cover = #{cover}, description = #{description}, category_id = #{categoryId}, status = #{status}, sort = #{sort}, view_count = #{viewCount}, total_episodes = #{totalEpisodes}, free_episodes = #{freeEpisodes}, beans_per_episode = #{beansPerEpisode}, display_name = #{displayName}, display_text = #{displayText}, oss_path = #{ossPath}, category = #{category}, task_status = #{taskStatus}, is_online = #{isOnline}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE dramas SET task_status = #{taskStatus}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
